name: DW · Dim Store
sql:
SELECT
    gs                                                                          AS store_id,
    'STR-' || lpad(gs::text, 3, '0')                                           AS store_code,
    (ARRAY['Downtown','Uptown','Midtown','Eastside','Westside','Harbor','Central','North','South','Plaza'])
        [1 + (('x'||substr(md5('STNM'||gs::text),1,8))::bit(32)::bigint % 10)::int]
        || ' #' || gs                                                          AS store_name,
    (ARRAY['New York','Chicago','LA','Houston','Miami'])
        [1 + (('x'||substr(md5('STCITY'||gs::text),1,8))::bit(32)::bigint % 5)::int] AS city,
    (ARRAY['Northeast','Midwest','West','South','Southeast'])
        [1 + (('x'||substr(md5('STREG'||gs::text),1,8))::bit(32)::bigint % 5)::int]  AS region,
    (ARRAY['Retail','Outlet','Online','Pop-up'])
        [1 + (('x'||substr(md5('STTYPE'||gs::text),1,8))::bit(32)::bigint % 4)::int] AS store_type,
    1000 + (('x'||substr(md5('STSQFT'||gs::text),1,8))::bit(32)::bigint % 9000)::int AS square_feet,
    CURRENT_DATE - (('x'||substr(md5('STOPEN'||gs::text),1,8))::bit(32)::bigint % 4000)::int AS opened_date
FROM generate_series(1, 50) AS gs
